notes: No published machine spec (Memento Cloud API is documented only in Apiary/API Blueprint). Authored a focused OpenAPI 3.0.3 from the vendor Apiary docs and the adaptor source. Base URL https://api.mementodatabase.com with /v1 prefix confirmed from src/util.js. Covers the exact paths the adaptor calls: GET /v1/libraries, GET /v1/libraries/{id}, GET/POST /v1/libraries/{id}/entries, GET/PATCH /v1/libraries/{id}/entries/{entryId}.
